_comment: Hand-authored diagrams. Survives codebase-visualizer post-commit regeneration because generate.py only rewrites ../../manifest.json and ../*.mmd. Merged into /api/architecture's response after the generated diagrams.

receiving_pipeline.title: Receiving Pipeline
receiving_pipeline.description: End-to-end map of the receiving flow: UI modes → API routes → core lib → Zoho/QStash/realtime → Neon tables. Dashed edges are cache invalidations.
